Title: M365 Cloud Lab
CanvasContent:
Start Here

Read this first. This portal documents a Microsoft 365 Personal Cloud Lab built in tenant jeremyfontenot.online using Microsoft 365 Business Premium. All configuration performed with PowerShell (Graph, Exchange Online, Teams).

Configuration Summary

  • Tenant: jeremyfontenot.online
  • License: Microsoft 365 Business Premium
  • Admin: jeremy.fontenot@jeremyfontenot.online
  • Automation: Graph PowerShell, Exchange Online PowerShell, Teams PowerShell

PowerShell Commands Used


Connect-MgGraph -Scopes 'User.Read.All','Directory.Read.All','Policy.Read.All'
Connect-ExchangeOnline
Connect-MicrosoftTeams

Validation Steps

  1. Confirm access to all pages via top navigation.
  2. Open each section to review configuration and validation steps.

  • https://jeremyfontenot.sharepoint.com/sites/M365-Documentation/SitePages/Portfolio-Summary.aspxResume Summary

Title: Cleanup Summary
CanvasContent:
This section documents the configuration and validation steps for .

Cleanup Summary

All existing users, groups, teams, policies, and configurations were removed to create a clean environment for this lab.

  • Non-admin users removed
  • Custom security groups deleted
  • Microsoft 365 groups cleared
  • Teams removed
  • Conditional Access policies removed
  • Intune policies removed
  • Shared mailboxes removed

Baseline environment contains only the Global Admin and default configuration.
Description: This section documents the configuration and validation steps for .

Title: Security Overview
CanvasContent:
This section documents the configuration and validation steps for .

Security Overview

Baseline security controls implemented:

  • Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
  • Conditional Access policy
  • Secure Score review
  • Audit logging enabled
  • Defender protections applied (Business Premium)
Description: This section documents the configuration and validation steps for .

Title: Validation Results
CanvasContent:
This section documents the configuration and validation steps for .

Validation Results

All components verified successfully:

  • Users licensed and active
  • MFA enforced
  • Conditional Access active
  • Shared mailbox accessible
  • Teams functional
  • Intune policies present
  • Audit logs generating entries
  • SharePoint documentation site operational
